channel.title: Projects on Adrian's Website
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Adrian's Website

item.title: Autonomous Robotic Grasping for On-orbit Satellite Repair
item.description: Path planning and controller design in MATLAB of a robotic arm that grasps spinning satellites in orbit

item.title: Inverted Pendulum on a Cart
item.description: Design of a feedback loop for the stabilization of an inverted pendulum on a cart

item.title: Model Aircraft CFD Analysis
item.description: Stability and performance analysis of an aircraft using computational fluid dynamics (CFD)

item.title: Prototype Realization
item.description: Design, build, and fly a humanitarian Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV)
